zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir. William de Montgomery於1239年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾艾可頓時，他的父親William de Montgomery32歲，母親Matilda Sutton23歲。他和Alice de Chaddesdon至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1303年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾蕾托 庫布利享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir. William de Montgomery was born in 1239, in Ecton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Montgomery, was 32 and his mother, Matilda Sutton, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Alice de Chaddesdon. He died in 1303, in Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir. William de Montgomery est né en 1239, à Ecton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Montgomery, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Matilda Sutton, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Alice de Chaddesdon. Il est décédé en 1303, à Little Cubley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir. William de Montgomeryが1239年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエクトンで生まれた時，父William de Montgomeryは32歳，母Matilda Suttonは23歳であった。彼はAlice de Chaddesdonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1303年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアリットル クウブリーで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir. William de Montgomery(이)가 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Montgomery(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Sutton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Alice de Chaddesdon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 리틀 쿠블리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir. William de Montgomery родился в 1239 г. в местности эктон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Montgomery было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Sutton, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Alice de Chaddesdon. Он умер в 1303 г. в местности литл кубли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
